CREATE TABLE test_map (m Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES ({'key1':'value1','key2':'value2'}), ({'key3':'value3','key4':'value4'});
SELECT mapValues(m) FROM test_map;
CREATE TABLE nested_map (id UInt32, m Map(String, Map(String, String))) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO nested_map VALUES (1, {'outerKey1': {'innerKey1':'innerValue1', 'innerKey2':'innerValue2'} }), (2, {'outerKey2': {'innerKey3':'innerValue3', 'innerKey4':'innerValue4'} });
SELECT mapValues(m) FROM nested_map;
SELECT mapValues(nested_map.m['outerKey1']) FROM nested_map WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_map (id UInt32, m Map(String, String), n Map(String, Float64)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO complex_map VALUES (1, {'name':'Alice','age':'30'}, {'height':5.5}), (2, {'name':'Bob','age':'25'}, {'height':6.0});
SELECT mapValues(m), mapValues(n) FROM complex_map;
CREATE TABLE joined_map (id UInt32, m Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO joined_map VALUES (1, {'name':'Charlie','age':'35'}), (2, {'name':'Diana','age':'40'});
SELECT mapValues(j.m) FROM complex_map c JOIN joined_map j ON c.id = j.id;
CREATE TABLE large_map (id UInt32, m Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO large_map VALUES (1, {'key1':'value1', 'key2':'value2', 'key3':'value3', 'key4':'value4', 'key5':'value5'});
SELECT mapValues(m) FROM large_map;
SELECT count(*) FROM large_map WHERE length(mapValues(m)) > 2;
CREATE TABLE multi_map (id UInt32, m Map(String, Map(String, UInt32))) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO multi_map VALUES (1, {'groupA': {'key1':1, 'key2':2}}, (2, {'groupB': {'key3':3, 'key4':4}});
SELECT flatten(arrayJoin(mapValues(m))) as values from multi_map;
